matches.activity_text: Coordinate, establish and draft the general management budget. matches.justification: This capability directly aligns with the activity's core function of coordinating, establishing and drafting the general management budget. matches.activity_text: Logistics: Ensure the logistical support necessary for the proper functioning of the DG; identify and manage the present and future spaces of the DG; support for office moves; liaise with DG ITEC on IT-related matters; overall coordination in the field of infrastructure and communication with other services of DG CASP, DG INLO and DG ITEC.

matches.activity_text: Manage the recruitment of staff for the DG, the organization chart of permanent, temporary and contractual staff positions, rights and obligations (absences, illness, leave, CCP, retirement, external activities), the mobility exercise, the selection of interns; monitoring of reintegration. Provide analysis and advice on strategic/regulatory issues relating to HR and their evolution; assist the DG in organizing the rating exercise.
matches.parent_org_name: Resources Unit
matches.parent_org_path: European Parliament Organizations > Directorate-General for Cohesion, Agriculture and Social Policies > Resources Unit

matches.justification: This capability directly encompasses the recruitment activities described in the activity, including staff selection processes and onboarding. The activity explicitly mentions "recruitment of staff for the DG" and "selection of interns" which are core functions of Selection & Recruitment.
matches.key_overlaps: Staff recruitment, intern selection, systematic identification and evaluation of candidates

matches.justification: This capability covers comprehensive employee lifecycle management including organizational charts, mobility exercises, and career progression activities mentioned in the activity. The activity's focus on managing staff positions, mobility, and reintegration monitoring aligns well with career management functions.
matches.key_overlaps: Organizational chart management, mobility exercise coordination, employee lifecycle management, reintegration monitoring

matches.activity_text: Perform the functions of delegated authorizing officer.
matches.parent_org_name: Directorate-General for Cohesion, Agriculture and Social Policies
matches.parent_org_path: European Parliament Organizations > Directorate-General for Cohesion, Agriculture and Social Policies

matches.justification: Budget Execution is the most directly aligned capability as delegated authorizing officers are fundamentally responsible for executing budget appropriations and ensuring proper financial authorization processes. This capability encompasses the operational core of financial management that directly supports the authorizing officer function.
matches.key_overlaps: Financial authorization processes, budget execution oversight, expenditure approval workflows, financial compliance management

matches.activity_text: Coordinate the procedures of the general management and the work of the central secretariat. Ensure compliance and correct application of applicable internal rules and procedures.
matches.parent_org_name: Directorate-General for Cohesion, Agriculture and Social Policies
matches.parent_org_path: European Parliament Organizations > Directorate-General for Cohesion, Agriculture and Social Policies

matches.activity_text: Represent general management in interinstitutional relations.
matches.parent_org_name: Directorate-General for Cohesion, Agriculture and Social Policies
matches.parent_org_path: European Parliament Organizations > Directorate-General for Cohesion, Agriculture and Social Policies

matches.activity_text: Manage human resources and the general management budget, in collaboration with the management team.
matches.parent_org_name: Directorate-General for Cohesion, Agriculture and Social Policies
matches.parent_org_path: European Parliament Organizations > Directorate-General for Cohesion, Agriculture and Social Policies

matches.activity_text: Represent the general management within the bodies of Parliament and ensure the monitoring and consistency of parliamentary work. Cooperate with other internal services of the Parliament, including the services responsible for EU policies (DG ECTI, IUST, BUDG, EXPO), the Directorate for the Coordination of Committees and Legislative Activities (CCLA), DG PRES and the Cabinets.
matches.parent_org_name: Directorate-General for Cohesion, Agriculture and Social Policies
matches.parent_org_path: European Parliament Organizations > Directorate-General for Cohesion, Agriculture and Social Policies

matches.activity_text: Ensure the proper functioning and administrative coordination of the work of parliamentary committees in the areas of cohesion policies, agriculture, fisheries, transport and tourism, social policies as well as the housing crisis in the EU.
matches.parent_org_name: Directorate-General for Cohesion, Agriculture and Social Policies
matches.parent_org_path: European Parliament Organizations > Directorate-General for Cohesion, Agriculture and Social Policies

matches.capability_name: EU Legislation examination, adoption and control

matches.activity_text: Define strategy and ensure the development of general management. Contribute to strengthening the role of Parliament in the exercise of its legislative, budgetary and control powers - in execution of the Parliamentary Reform 2024 program - through support to parliamentary committees, including expertise.
matches.parent_org_name: Directorate-General for Cohesion, Agriculture and Social Policies
